e=e||0,Math.round((e>360?e-360:e)*6e4)}function du(e){const t=e.toString(16);return t.length===1?"0"+t:t}function fu(e,t,r){return(du(e)+du(t)+du(r)).toUpperCase()}function Ye(e,t){let r=(e||"").replace("#","");!nu.test(r)&&r!==vr.background1&&r!==vr.background2&&r!==vr.text1&&r!==vr.text2&&r!==vr.accent1&&r!==vr.accent2&&r!==vr.accent3&&r!==vr.accent4&&r!==vr.accent5&&r!==vr.accent6&&(console.warn(`"${r}" is not a valid scheme color or hex RGB! Only provide 6-digit RGB or 'pptx.SchemeColor' values!`),r=cr);const n=nu.test(r)?"srgbClr":"schemeClr",a='val="'+(nu.test(r)?r.toUpperCase():r)+'"';return t?`<a:${n} ${a}>${t}</a:${n}>`:`<a:${n} ${a}/>`}function p1(e,t){let r="";const n=Object.assign(Object.assign({},t),e),a=Math.round(n.size*ei),o=n.color,i=Math.round(n.opacity*1e5);return r+=`<a:glow rad="${a}">`,r+=Ye(o,`<a:alpha Cn(e){return e._rels.length+e._relsChart.length+e._relsMedia.length+1}function pu(e){if(!(!e||typeof e!="object"))return e.type!=="outer"&&e.type!=="inner"&&e.type!=="none"&&(console.warn("Warning: shadow.type options are `outer`, `inner` or `none`."),e.type="outer"),e.angle&&((isNaN(Number(e.angle))||e.angle<0||e.angle>359)&&(console.warn("Warning: shadow.angle can only be r.holeSize=="number"?r.holeSize:"50"}"/>`),s+="</c:"+e+"Chart>";break;default:s+="";break}return s}function hu(e,t,r){let n="";return e._type===he.SCATTER||e._type===he.BUBBLE||e._type===he.BUBBLE3D?n+="<c:valAx>":n+="<c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',n+="  <c:scaling>",n+='<c:orientation val="'+(e.catAxisOrientation||(e.barDir==="col","minMax"))+'"/>',(e.catAxisMaxVal||e.catAxisMaxVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:max val="${e.catAxisMaxVal}"/>`),(e.catAxisMinVal||e.catAxisMinVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:min val="${e.catAxisMinVal}"/>`),n+="</c:scaling>",n+='  <c:delete val="'+(e.catAxisHidden?"1":"0")+'"/>',n+='  <c:axPos val="'+(e.barDir==="col"?"b":"l")+'"/>',n+=e.catGridLine.style!=="none"?mu(e.catGridLine):"",e.showCatAxisTitle&&(n+=Ps({color:e.catAxisTitleColor,fontFace:e.catAxisTitleFontFace,fontSize:e.catAxisTitleFontSize,titleRotate:e.catAxisTitleRotate,title:e.catAxisTitle||"Axis Title"})),e._type===he.SCATTER||e._type===he.BUBBLE||e._type===he.BUBBLE3D?n+='  <c:numFmt formatCode="'+(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode?Ne(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode):"General")+'" sourceLinked="1"/>':n+=' val="nextTo"/>'):(n+='  <c:majorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMajorTickMark||"out")+'"/>',n+='  <c:minorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMinorTickMark||"none")+'"/>',n+='  <c:tickLblPos val="'+(e.catAxisLabelPos||(e.barDir==="col"?"low":"nextTo"))+'"/>'),n+="  <c:spPr>",n+=`    <a:ln w="${e.catAxisLineSize?Le(e.catAxisLineSize):ei}" cap="flat">`,n+=e.catAxisLineShow?"<a:solidFill>"+Ye(e.catAxisLineColor||Ca.color)+"</a:solidFill>":"<a:noFill/>",n+='      <a:prstDash val="'+(e.catAxisLineStyle||"solid")+'"/>',n+="      <a:round/>",n+="    </a:ln>",n+="  </c:spPr>",n+="  <c:txPr>",e.catAxisLabelRotate?n+=`<a:bodyPr rot="${Sa(e.catAxisLabelRotate)}"/>`:n+="<a:bodyPr/>",n+="    <a:lstStyle/>",n+="    <a:p>",n+="    <a:pPr>",n+=`      <a:defRPr sz="${Math.round((e.catAxisLabelFontSize||Tr)*100)}" b="${e.catAxisLabelFontBold?1:0}" i="${e.catAxisLabelFontItalic?1:0}" u="none" strike="noStrike">`,n+="      <a:solidFill>"+Ye(e.catAxisLabelColor||cr)+"</a:solidFill>",n+='      <a:latin typeface="'+(e.catAxisLabelFontFace||"Arial")+'"/>',n+="   </a:defRPr>",n+="  </a:pPr>",n+='  <a:endParaRPr lang="'+(e.lang||"en-US")+'"/>',n+="  </a:p>",n+=" </c:txPr>",n+=' <c:crossAx val="'+r+'"/>',n+=` <c:${typeof e.valAxisCrossesAt=="number"?"crossesAt":"crosses"} val="${e.valAxisCrossesAt||"autoZero"}"/>`,n+=' <c:auto val="1"/>',n+=' <c:lblAlgn val="ctr"/>',n+=` <c:noMultiLvlLbl val="${e.catAxisMultiLevelLabels?0:1}"/>`,e.catAxisLabelFrequency&&(n+=' <c:tickLblSkip val="'+e.catAxisLabelFrequency+'"/>'),(e.catLabelFormatCode||e._type===he.SCATTER||e._type===he.BUBBLE||e._type===he.BUBBLE3D)&&(e.catLabelFormatCode&&(["catAxisBaseTimeUnit","catAxisMajorTimeUnit","catAxisMinorTimeUnit"].forEach(a=>{e[a]&&(typeof e[a]!="string"||!["days","months","years"].includes(e[a].toLowerCase()))&&(console.warn(`"${a}" must be one of: 'days','months','years' !`),e[a]=null)}),e.catAxisBaseTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:baseTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisBaseTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>'),e.catAxisMajorTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:majorTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisMajorTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>'),e.catAxisMinorTimeUnit&&(n+='<c:minorTimeUnit val="'+e.catAxisMinorTimeUnit.toLowerCase()+'"/>')),e.catAxisMajorUnit&&(n+=`<c:majorUnit val="${e.catAxisMajorUnit}"/>`),e.catAxisMinorUnit&&(n+=`<c:minorUnit val="${e.catAxisMinorUnit}"/>`)),e._type===he.SCATTER||e._type===he.BUBBLE||e._type===he.BUBBLE3D?n+="</c:valAx>":n+="</c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n}function gu(e,t){let r=t===_n?e.barDir==="col"?"l":"b":e.barDir!=="col"?"r":"t";t===Ss&&(r="r");const n=t===_n?ri:ou;let a="";return a+="<c:valAx>",a+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',a+=" marL="0"',a="<a:buNone/>");e.options.tabStops&&Array.isArray(e.options.tabStops)&&(l=`<a:tabLst>${e.options.tabStops.map(p=>`<a:tab pos="${Qe(p.position||1)}" algn="${p.alignment||"l"}"/>`).join("")}</a:tabLst>`),u+=">"+o+i+a+l,t&&(u+=Mh(e.options,!0)),u+="</"+c+">"}return u}function Mh(e,t){var r;let n="";const a=t?"a:defRPr":"a:rPr";if(n+="<"+a+' Y2(e){const t=Ms({nonce:ce()});return le(()=>e?.value||t.nonce?.value)}function Zu(e,t="hex"){switch(t){case"hex":return K2(e);case"rgb":return J2(e);case"hsl":return Z2(e);case"hsb":return eS(e);default:throw new Error(`Unknown format: ${t}`)}}function K2(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:Ln(e),r=n=>Math.round(n).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");if(t.alpha<1){const n=Math.round(t.alpha*255).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}${n}`}return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}`}function J2(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:Ln(e),{r,g:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`rgba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)}, ${o})`:`rgb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)})`}function Z2(e){const t=e.space==="hsl"?e:mo(e),{h:r,s:n,l:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsla(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsl(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function eS(e){const t=e.space==="hsb"?e:Js(e),{h:r,s:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function Ln(e){if(e.space==="rgb")return e;if(e.space==="hsl")return rS(e);if(e.space==="hsb")return aS(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${e.space}`)}function mo(e){return e.space==="hsl"?e:tS(Ln(e))}function Js(e){return e.space==="hsb"?e:nS(Ln(e))}function tS(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const c=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=c>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:c*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function rS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(u,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?u+(d-u)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?u+(d-u)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:u),c=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-c;a=l(s,c,t+1/3),o=l(s,c,t),i=l(s,c,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function nS(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const c=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:c*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function aS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),c=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),u=n*(1-c*r),d=n*(1-(1-c)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=u,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=u,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=u;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function pi(e){switch(e){case"hue":return{min:0,max:360,step:1};case"saturation":case"lightness":case"brightness":case"alpha":return{min:0,max:100,step:1};case"red":case"green":case"blue":return{min:0,max:255,step:1};default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${e}`)}}function Ai(e,t){switch(t){case"red":return e.space==="rgb"?e.r:Ln(e).r;case"green":return e.space==="rgb"?e.g:Ln(e).g;case"blue":return e.space==="rgb"?e.b:Ln(e).b;case"hue":return e.space==="hsl"?e.h:mo(e).h;case"saturation":return e.space==="hsl"||e.space==="hsb"?e.s:mo(e).s;case"lightness":return e.space==="hsl"?e.l:mo(e).l;case"brightness":return e.space==="hsb"?e.b:Js(e).b;case"alpha":return e.alpha*100;default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}}function Da(e,t,r){const n=pi(t),a=Math.max(n.min,Math.min(n.max,r));if(t==="alpha")return{...e,alpha:a/100};if(t==="red"||t==="green"||t==="blue"){const i={...Ln(e),[t==="red"?"r":t==="green"?"g":"b"]:a};return oS(i,e.space)}if(t==="hue"||t==="lightness"){const i={...mo(e),[t==="hue"?"h":"l"]:a};return jg(i,e.space)}if(t==="saturation"){if(e.space==="hsb"){const c={...Js(e),s:a};return Qg(c,e.space)}const i={...mo(e),s:a};return jg(i,e.space)}if(t==="brightness"){const i={...Js(e),b:a};return Qg(i,e.space)}throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}function oS(e,t){if(t==="rgb")return e;if(t==="hsl")return Yg(e);if(t==="hsb")return Kg(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function jg(e,t){if(t==="hsl")return e;const r=iS(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsb")return Kg(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function Qg(e,t){if(t==="hsb")return e;const r=sS(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsl")return Yg(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function Yg(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const c=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=c>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:c*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function iS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(u,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?u+(d-u)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?u+(d-u)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:u),c=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-c;a=l(s,c,t+1/3),o=l(s,c,t),i=l(s,c,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Kg(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const c=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:c*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function sS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),c=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),u=n*(1-c*r),d=n*(1-(1-c)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=u,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=u,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=u;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Zs(e){const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();if(t.startsWith("#"))return lS(t);if(t.startsWith("rgb"))return cS(t);if(t.startsWith("hsl"))return uS(t);if(t.startsWith("hsb")||t.startsWith("hsv"))return dS(t);throw new Error(`Unable to parse color: ${e}`)}function lS(e){let t=e.slice(1);if(!/^[0-9A-F]{3}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{8}$/i.test(t))throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}. Expected format: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA`);if(t.length===3&&(t=t.split("").map(r=>r+r).join("")),t.length===6){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>16&255,g:r>>8&255,b:r&255,alpha:1}}if(t.length===8){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>24&255,g:r>>16&255,b:r>>8&255,alpha:(r&255)/255}}throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}`)}function cS(e){const t=e.match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid RGB color: ${e}`);return{space:"rgb",r:parseFloat(t[1]),g:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function uS(e){const t=e.match(/hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSL color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsl",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),l:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function dS(e){const t=e.match(/hsb[av]?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSB color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsb",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function fS(e){return typeof e=="string"?Zs(e):e}function pS(e){try{return Zs(e),!0}catch{return!1}}const[AS,hS]=ar("ColorFieldRoot");var
